description_long: This is a vintage, boxy suitcase with a hard rectangular structure, covered in dark green or black canvas and reinforced with brown leather trim along the edges and corners. The suitcase features several old, partially torn travel stickers on its surfaces, suggesting extensive use and travel history. The front side is equipped with a sturdy fixed leather handle, two metal latches, and a small paper tag attached to the handle. The metal hardware, including the latches and handle mounts, shows signs of tarnish and age. The surface of the suitcase is visibly worn, with scuffs, scratches, and faded areas, especially on the main panels. No wheels or external pockets are present, and there is no visible brand logo.
description: A vintage, boxy suitcase with dark canvas, brown leather trim, metal latches, and old travel stickers. The surface is worn and aged, with a fixed leather handle and no visible wheels or logo.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, worn canvas panel with brown leather trim and some scuff marks, but no handle or latches.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a flat canvas surface with brown leather trim and several old, partially torn travel stickers.
description_view_2: The front view features a fixed leather handle, two metal latches, a paper tag, and visible travel stickers on the main panel.
description_view_3: The right side view shows more travel stickers and scuffs on the canvas, with brown leather trim but no handle or latches.
